title: mentha pulegium subvar. prostrata
intro: Mentha pulegium subvar. prostrata, also known as creeping pennyroyal, is a low-growing, spreading variety of the pennyroyal plant, native to Europe and North America. The medicinal properties of creeping pennyroyal include its carminative and antispasmodic properties, which help to relieve digestive issues and ease muscle spasms. The health benefits of using creeping pennyroyal include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce stress and anxiety. Creeping pennyroyal can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
